title: School Election 2003, National Study
description: "School election 2003, nationwide opinion poll" is a national opinion poll (telephone interview) conducted by Sentio Norsk statistik A/S on behalf of Sikt - Norwegian Agency for Shared Services in Education and Research (then Norsk samsunsvitenskapselig datatjeneste AS (NSD)). The questions included in the poll are the same as those asked to upper secondary school students in the 2003 school choice survey.
